series_metadata.series_description: Applicant materials, such as civil service applications, letters of interest, resumes, reference materials, and other documents pertaining to an applicant, their work experience, or education

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two (2) years after position is filled, or until converted to machine readable. ; Electronic: Retain two (2) years after positions is filled., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
